generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure reinforced my existing support for expanded domestic security powers. The credibility of the retired FBI analyst and the mention of data showing effectiveness increased my confidence in the position.

request_payload.exposure_text: Retired FBI counterterrorism analyst here. The 2024 domestic security reforms weren't just about stopping attacks - they actually made us safer while preserving our rights. As someone who spent 25 years tracking real threats, I can tell you these measures work. The data shows fewer disruptions at major events and better coordination between agencies. We can't afford to go back to the old system where information didn't flow properly. Security experts across the board agree these powers are necessary and proportionate. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
